# train.coach { #raccoon.train.coach }

`train.coach`

Training orchestrator: self-play -> replay buffer -> SGD -> checkpoint.

## Classes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [Coach](#raccoon.train.coach.Coach) | Runs the AlphaZero training loop. |

### Coach { #raccoon.train.coach.Coach }

```python
train.coach.Coach(
    network,
    optimizer,
    replay_buffer,
    num_simulations=100,
    batch_size=256,
    games_per_iteration=50,
    training_steps_per_iteration=100,
    checkpoint_dir='checkpoints',
    log_dir='logs',
    experiment_name='',
    checkpoint_every=10,
    num_workers=8,
    virtual_loss_count=1,
    dirichlet_alpha=0.0,
    noise_eps=0.25,
    value_bootstrap_alpha=1.0,
    scheduler=None,
    notes='',
)
```

Runs the AlphaZero training loop.

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [run_iteration](#raccoon.train.coach.Coach.run_iteration) | One full iteration: self-play -> train -> checkpoint -> log. |
| [self_play_phase](#raccoon.train.coach.Coach.self_play_phase) | Generate training data through parallel self-play. |
| [training_phase](#raccoon.train.coach.Coach.training_phase) | Train the network on sampled positions from the replay buffer. |

##### run_iteration { #raccoon.train.coach.Coach.run_iteration }

```python
train.coach.Coach.run_iteration(iteration, last_iteration=None)
```

One full iteration: self-play -> train -> checkpoint -> log.

##### self_play_phase { #raccoon.train.coach.Coach.self_play_phase }

```python
train.coach.Coach.self_play_phase()
```

Generate training data through parallel self-play.

##### training_phase { #raccoon.train.coach.Coach.training_phase }

```python
train.coach.Coach.training_phase()
```

Train the network on sampled positions from the replay buffer.

``target_value`` is already normalised to [-1, 1] by ``self_play``
(raw backgammon returns ±1/±2/±3 divided by 3), so it can be matched
directly against the tanh-bounded value head output.
